name: Green Gypsy Thrift Shop
tagline: A curated thrift store in the old Waialua Sugar Mill — vintage aloha shirts, surfwear, and bohemian North Shore finds.
parking: Free lot at the Sugar Mill
bestTime: Saturday when combined with the Waialua Farmers Market
talkStory: A hidden gem thrift store inside the old Waialua Sugar Mill compound on the North Shore. The curated selection includes vintage aloha shirts, jewelry, hats, shoes, swimsuits, and wetsuits at excellent prices. The vibe is bohemian and laid-back, fitting perfectly with the North Shore lifestyle. Locals who surf the North Shore regularly shop here for gear and vintage finds. Combine with the Waialua Farmers Market on Saturday mornings.
